inputs.label: Vertical Drop
inputs.businessContext: Height difference between start and end of ski slope in meters

businessContext_i18n.en: Height difference between start and end of ski slope in meters
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kayak pistinin başlangıcı ve bitişi arasındaki metre cinsinden yükseklik farkı

businessContext_i18n.fr: Différence de hauteur entre le début et la fin de la piste de ski en mètres
businessContext_i18n.es: Diferencia de altura entre el inicio y el final de la pista de esquí en metros

businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de fricción de la nieve (0.02-0.1), según las condiciones de la nieve

inputs.label: Initial Speed
inputs.businessContext: Initial speed at start of slope in meters per second

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial speed at start of slope in meters per second
businessContext_i18n.de: Anfangsgeschwindigkeit am Start der Piste in Metern pro Sekunde
